groups.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity
groups.description: Apache License 2.0 applies to this metadata. JSON files cannot include comment headers.

groups.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.session
groups.description: Session and security context configuration properties.

groups.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.basic-digest-auth
groups.description: Basic and digest HTTP authentication properties.

groups.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.port-channel
groups.description: Port mapping and secure channel configuration properties.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.active
properties.description: Whether the plugin is enabled.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.printStatusMessages
properties.description: Whether to print status messages such as "Configuring Spring Security Core ...".

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rejectIfNoRule
properties.description: Strict mode where a request mapping is required for all resources.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.excludeSpringSecurityAutoConfiguration
properties.description: Whether to automatically exclude Spring Boot security auto-configuration classes that conflict with the plugin.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useBasicAuth
properties.description: Whether to enable HTTP Basic authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useDigestAuth
properties.description: Whether to enable HTTP Digest authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useSwitchUserFilter
properties.description: Whether to enable the switch user filter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useX509
properties.description: Whether to enable X.509 authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useExternalClasses
properties.description: If true, use external domain classes.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useRoleGroups
properties.description: If true, enable role groups.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.userDomainClassName
properties.description: User class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.usernamePropertyName
properties.description: User class username property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.usernameIgnoreCase
properties.description: Ignore case when searching for usernamePropertyName.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.passwordPropertyName
properties.description: User class password property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.authoritiesPropertyName
properties.description: User class role collection property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.enabledPropertyName
properties.description: User class enabled property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.accountExpiredPropertyName
properties.description: User class account expired property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.accountLockedPropertyName
properties.description: User class account locked property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.passwordExpiredPropertyName
properties.description: User class password expired property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.userLookup.authorityJoinClassName
properties.description: User and role many-to-many join class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.authority.className
properties.description: Role class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.authority.nameField
properties.description: Role class role name property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.authority.groupAuthorityNameField
properties.description: Role class authority group name property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.requestMap.className
properties.description: Requestmap class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.requestMap.urlField
properties.description: Requestmap class URL pattern property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.requestMap.configAttributeField
properties.description: Requestmap class role and token property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.requestMap.httpMethodField
properties.description: Requestmap class HTTP method property.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.filterProcessesUrl
properties.description: Login form post URL, intercepted by Spring Security filter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.usernameParameter
properties.description: Login form username parameter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.passwordParameter
properties.description: Login form password parameter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.allowSessionCreation
properties.description: Whether to allow authentication to create an HTTP session.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.postOnly
properties.description: Whether to allow only POST login requests.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.continueChainBeforeSuccessfulAuthentication
properties.description: Whether to continue calling subsequent filters in the filter chain.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.apf.storeLastUsername
properties.description: Whether to store the login username in the HTTP session.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.failureHandler.defaultFailureUrl
properties.description: Redirect URL for failed logins.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.failureHandler.ajaxAuthFailUrl
properties.description: Redirect URL for failed Ajax logins.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.failureHandler.exceptionMappings
properties.description: Map of AuthenticationException subclasses to redirect URLs after authentication failure.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.failureHandler.useForward
properties.description: Whether to render the error page (true) or redirect (false).

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.failureHandler.allowSessionCreation
properties.description: Whether to enable session creation to store the authentication failure exception.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.successHandler.defaultTargetUrl
properties.description: Default post-login URL if there is no saved request that triggered the login.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.successHandler.alwaysUseDefault
properties.description: Whether to always redirect to successHandler.defaultTargetUrl after successful authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.successHandler.targetUrlParameter
properties.description: Name of optional login form parameter that specifies destination after successful login.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.successHandler.useReferer
properties.description: Whether to use the HTTP Referer header to determine post-login destination.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.successHandler.ajaxSuccessUrl
properties.description: URL for redirect after successful Ajax login.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.auth.loginFormUrl
properties.description: URL of login page.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.auth.forceHttps
properties.description: If true, redirects login page requests to HTTPS.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.auth.ajaxLoginFormUrl
properties.description: URL of Ajax login page.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.auth.useForward
properties.description: Whether to render the login page (true) or redirect (false).

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.afterLogoutUrl
properties.description: URL for redirect after logout.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.filterProcessesUrl
properties.description: Logout URL, intercepted by Spring Security filter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.handlerNames
properties.description: Logout handler bean names.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.clearAuthentication
properties.description: If true removes the Authentication from the SecurityContext to prevent issues with concurrent requests.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.invalidateHttpSession
properties.description: Whether to invalidate the HTTP session when logging out.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.targetUrlParameter
properties.description: The querystring parameter name for the post-logout URL.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.alwaysUseDefaultTargetUrl
properties.description: Whether to always use afterLogoutUrl as the post-logout URL.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.redirectToReferer
properties.description: Whether to use the Referer header value as the post-logout URL.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.logout.postOnly
properties.description: If true only POST requests will be allowed to logout.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.adh.errorPage
properties.description: Location of the 403 error page (or set to null to send a 403 error and not render a page).

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.adh.ajaxErrorPage
properties.description: Location of the 403 error page for Ajax requests.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.adh.useForward
properties.description: If true a forward will be used to render the error page, otherwise a redirect is used.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.cookieName
properties.description: Remember-me cookie name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.cookieDomain
properties.description: Remember-me cookie domain.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.alwaysRemember
properties.description: Whether to always remember users.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.tokenValiditySeconds
properties.description: Remember-me token validity in seconds.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.parameter
properties.description: Remember-me parameter name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.key
properties.description: Key used to identify remember-me tokens.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.persistent
properties.description: Whether to use persistent remember-me tokens.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.persistentToken.domainClassName
properties.description: Persistent token domain class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.persistentToken.seriesLength
properties.description: Persistent token series length.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.persistentToken.tokenLength
properties.description: Persistent token token length.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.useSecureCookie
properties.description: Whether to use a secure remember-me cookie.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.rememberMe.createSessionOnSuccess
properties.description: Whether to create a session after remember-me login.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.basic.realmName
properties.description: Realm name for HTTP Basic authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.basic.credentialsCharset
properties.description: Credentials charset for HTTP Basic authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.realmName
properties.description: Realm name for HTTP Digest authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.key
properties.description: Key for HTTP Digest authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.nonceValiditySeconds
properties.description: Digest nonce validity in seconds.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.passwordAlreadyEncoded
properties.description: Whether digest passwords are already encoded.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.createAuthenticatedToken
properties.description: Whether to create authenticated tokens for digest auth.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.digest.useCleartextPasswords
properties.description: Whether to use cleartext passwords for digest auth.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.switchUser.switchUserUrl
properties.description: URL used to switch users.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.switchUser.exitUserUrl
properties.description: URL used to exit switched user.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.switchUser.targetUrl
properties.description: Target URL after switching user.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.switchUser.switchFailureUrl
properties.description: Failure URL for switch user.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.switchUser.usernameParameter
properties.description: Username parameter for switch user.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.portMapper.httpPort
properties.description: HTTP port for port mapping.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.portMapper.httpsPort
properties.description: HTTPS port for port mapping.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.definition
properties.description: Secure channel definition rules.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.useHeaderCheckChannelSecurity
properties.description: Whether to use header based channel security.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.secureHeaderName
properties.description: Header name indicating secure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.secureHeaderValue
properties.description: Header value indicating secure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.secureConfigAttributeKeyword
properties.description: Config attribute keyword for secure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.insecureHeaderName
properties.description: Header name indicating insecure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.insecureHeaderValue
properties.description: Header value indicating insecure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.secureChannel.insecureConfigAttributeKeyword
properties.description: Config attribute keyword for insecure channel.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.continueFilterChainOnUnsuccessfulAuthentication
properties.description: Whether to continue filter chain when X.509 authentication fails.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.subjectDnRegex
properties.description: Regex for extracting username from subject DN.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.subjectDnClosure
properties.description: Closure to extract principal from subject DN.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.checkForPrincipalChanges
properties.description: Whether to check for principal changes.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.invalidateSessionOnPrincipalChange
properties.description: Whether to invalidate the session when the principal changes.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.x509.throwExceptionWhenTokenRejected
properties.description: Whether to throw an exception when the token is rejected.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.ajaxHeader
properties.description: Header name sent by Ajax library, used to detect Ajax.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.ajaxCheckClosure
properties.description: An optional closure that can determine if a request is Ajax.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.ipRestrictions
properties.description: List of IP addresses allowed by the IP restriction filter.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.beanTypeResolverClass
properties.description: Bean type resolver class name.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.gsp.layoutAuth
properties.description: Layout name for auth views.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.gsp.layoutDenied
properties.description: Layout name for denied views.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.redirectStrategy.contextRelative
properties.description: If true, the redirect URL will be the value after the request context path.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.fii.alwaysReauthenticate
properties.description: If true, re-authenticates when there is an Authentication in the SecurityContext.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.fii.rejectPublicInvocations
properties.description: Disallow URL access when there is no request mapping.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.fii.validateConfigAttributes
properties.description: Whether to check that all ConfigAttribute instances are valid at startup.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.fii.publishAuthorizationSuccess
properties.description: Whether to publish an AuthorizedEvent after successful access check.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.fii.observeOncePerRequest
properties.description: If false, allow checks to happen multiple times.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.anon.key
properties.description: anonymousProcessingFilter key.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.atr.anonymousClass
properties.description: Anonymous token class.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.atr.rememberMeClass
properties.description: Remember-me token class.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useHttpSessionEventPublisher
properties.description: If true, an HttpSessionEventPublisher will be configured.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.cacheUsers
properties.description: If true, logins are cached using an EhCache.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useSecurityEventListener
properties.description: If true, configure SecurityEventListener.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.dao.reflectionSaltSourceProperty
properties.description: Which property to use for the reflection-based salt source.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.password.algorithm
properties.description: Password encoding algorithm.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.password.encodeHashAsBase64
properties.description: Whether to Base64 encode password hashes.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.password.bcrypt.logrounds
properties.description: BCrypt log rounds.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.password.hash.iterations
properties.description: Hashing iterations.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.dao.hideUserNotFoundExceptions
properties.description: If true, throws BadCredentialsException for both bad username and bad password.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.requestCache.createSession
properties.description: Whether caching SavedRequest can trigger the creation of a session.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.useSessionFixationPrevention
properties.description: Whether to use session fixation prevention.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.sessionFixationPrevention.migrate
properties.description: Whether to migrate the session on authentication.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.sessionFixationPrevention.alwaysCreateSession
properties.description: Whether to always create a session for session fixation prevention.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.roleHierarchy
properties.description: Hierarchical role definition.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.voterNames
properties.description: Bean names of voters.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.providerNames
properties.description: Bean names of authentication providers.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.afterInvocationManagerProviderNames
properties.description: AfterInvocationManager provider bean names.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.securityConfigType
properties.description: Type of request mapping to use, one of Annotation, Requestmap, or InterceptUrlMap.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.controllerAnnotations.lowercase
properties.description: Whether to do URL comparisons using lowercase.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.controllerAnnotations.staticRules
properties.description: Extra rules that cannot be mapped using annotations.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.interceptUrlMap
properties.description: Request mapping definition when using InterceptUrlMap.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.registerLoggerListener
properties.description: If true, registers a LoggerListener that logs interceptor-related application events.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.scr.allowSessionCreation
properties.description: Whether to allow creating a session in the securityContextRepository bean.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.scr.disableUrlRewriting
properties.description: Whether to disable URL rewriting (and the jsessionid attribute).

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.scr.springSecurityContextKey
properties.description: The HTTP session key to store the SecurityContext under.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.scpf.forceEagerSessionCreation
properties.description: Whether to eagerly create a session in the securityContextRepository bean.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.sch.strategyName
properties.description: The strategy to use for storing the SecurityContext.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.debug.useFilter
properties.description: Whether to use the DebugFilter to log request debug information to the console.

properties.name: grails.plugin.springsecurity.providerManager.eraseCredentialsAfterAuthentication
properties.description: Whether to remove the password from the Authentication and its child objects after successful authentication.
